cards.name: Sally Forth
cards.text: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens hold a treasure token in enemy territory.

cards.name: Stand Firm
cards.text: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Stagger tokens holds a treasure token in enemy territory.

cards.name: Step by Step
cards.text: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Move tokens holds a treasure token in enemy territory. If you are the underdog, that friendly fighter can have any Charge tokens instead.

cards.name: Unassailable
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's Attack if a friendly fighter holding a treasure token was the target of that Attack.

cards.name: Aggressive Defender
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is holding a treasure token.

cards.name: Careful Advance
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves if 2 or more friendly fighters that have Move tokens are in enemy territory.

cards.name: Hold Treasure Token 1 or 2
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 1 or 2.

cards.name: Hold Treasure Token 3 or 4
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 3 or 4.

cards.name: Hold Treasure Token 5
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 5.

cards.name: Slow Advance
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds any treasure tokens in both neutral territory and enemy territory.

cards.name: Iron Grasp
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds all of the treasure tokens in a friendly and/or enemy territory.

cards.name: Supremacy
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters with a total Bounty characteristic of 3 or more hold treasure tokens. Restricted

cards.name: Switch Things Up
cards.text: Pick 2 treasure tokens. Swap the positions of those treasure tokens.

cards.name: Sidestep
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: The Extra Mile
cards.text: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves. Push that fighter 1 hex. That push must end on a feature token.

cards.name: Settle In
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter on a feature token. Give that fighter a Guard token.

cards.name: Healing Potion
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter. If you are the underdog, you can roll a Save dice. On a {icon:block} or {icon:crit}, heal that fighter again.

cards.name: Hidden Paths
cards.text: Pick a friendly fighter in an edge hex. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in a different empty edge hex. Then, give that fighter a Move token, unless you are the underdog.

cards.name: Confusion
cards.text: Pick 2 adjacent fighters. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from.

cards.name: Hold the Line!
cards.text: Fighters cannot be driven back. This effect persists until the end of the next Action step.

cards.name: Shoulder Throw
cards.text: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target is adjacent. Remove the target from the battlefield, and then place them in a different empty hex adjacent to the attacker.

cards.name: By the Numbers
cards.text: Draw a number of Power cards equal to the number of treasure tokens held by your warband.

cards.name: Stubborn to the End
cards.text: If this fighter is the target of an Attack, the attacker cannot use Overrun.

cards.name: Inviolate
cards.text: This fighter cannot be Flanked or Surrounded while they hold a treasure token.

cards.name: Great Speed
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Move.

cards.name: Sharp Reflexes
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Save, to a maximum of 2.

cards.name: Brute Momentum
cards.text: This fighter cannot be driven back while they have any Charge tokens.

cards.name: Agile
cards.text: Deft: After you make a Save roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

cards.name: Duellist
cards.text: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

cards.name: Great Fortitude
cards.text: This fighter has +1 Health.

cards.name: Keen Eye
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

cards.name: Great Strength
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous.
